about.name: Ganapathy N
about.title: Senior Frontend & Full Stack Developer
about.bio: Senior Frontend & Full Stack Developer with 6+ years of experience specializing in React.js, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, and modern JavaScript ecosystems. I design and build high-performance, accessible, and scalable enterprise web and mobile applications. With hands-on expertise spanning state management, UI systems, backend APIs (Node.js, Express.js), and AWS cloud DevOps architectures, I collaborate to deliver modern solutions aligned with business goals.
